info.name: EcoSpark Hub API
info.description: Complete automated Postman collection for EcoSpark Hub backend. Covers all modules: Auth, User, Category, Idea, Vote, Comment, Payment, Newsletter, and Dashboard. Pre-scripts and post-scripts handle token management, variable chaining, and automated test assertions.

exec: // Collection-level test: log status for every request

item.description: Authentication flows: register, login (member & admin), refresh token, logout.

item.description: Category CRUD. GET endpoints are public; POST/PATCH/DELETE require Admin token.

item.name: Create Category for Ideas (Admin — keep)
item.description: Creates a persistent category that will be used by idea tests.

item.name: 04 - Idea
item.description: Full idea lifecycle: create, list, edit, submit, admin approve/reject, delete.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Solar-Powered Bus Stops",
  "problemStatement": "Urban bus stops waste energy using grid-powered lighting even during peak sunlight hours.",
  "proposedSolution": "Install solar panels on bus stop roofs to power LED lighting and USB charging ports.",
  "description": "This initiative reduces municipal electricity costs and provides commuters with free phone charging while cutting carbon emissions.",
  "categoryId": "{{categoryId}}",
  "paymentStatus": "FREE"
}

{
  "title": "AI-Driven Smart Grid Optimizer",
  "problemStatement": "Traditional power grids cannot dynamically balance load, causing brownouts and energy waste.",
  "proposedSolution": "Machine-learning algorithms predict demand spikes 15 minutes ahead and reroute supply automatically.",
  "description": "This premium blueprint includes architecture diagrams and API specs for integrating with major grid providers.",
  "categoryId": "{{categoryId}}",
  "paymentStatus": "PAID",
  "price": 9.99
}

item.description: Creates a second free idea to be rejected, then rejects it.

item.name: Member Delete Own Idea (Member)
item.description: Creates and immediately deletes an idea to test member delete flow.

exec: // We'll create a transient idea in the test script itself — using a separate request is cleaner.
// This request deletes the freeIdeaId if it is still in DRAFT status.
// NOTE: Once approved, member cannot delete — skip if already approved.
// Idea is APPROVED so member cannot delete it — expect 403
pm.test('403 Forbidden (idea already approved) OR 200 deleted', () => {

item.name: 05 - Vote
item.description: Cast upvote/downvote and remove vote on ideas.

item.name: 06 - Comment
item.description: Nested comments: get comments tree, add top-level comment, add reply, delete comment.

item.name: 07 - Payment
item.description: Stripe payment: create checkout session, verify payment status. Webhook is tested separately via Stripe CLI.

item.name: Create Checkout Session for Paid Idea (Member)
item.description: Initiates a Stripe Checkout session. The returned URL should be opened in a browser to complete payment in test mode.

exec: // Ensure we have a valid paidIdeaId; log it for debugging
console.log('Open this URL in browser to complete test payment:', url);

item.name: Verify Payment - Before Payment (Expect unpaid)
item.description: Before completing Stripe checkout, should return isPaid: false.

exec: // Before completing payment via Stripe, this should be false/PENDING

item.name: Stripe Webhook (simulate — for local testing)
item.description: ⚠️ In production, Stripe sends this. Use 'stripe listen --forward-to localhost:5000/api/payment/webhook' with Stripe CLI for real testing. This request simulates a minimal event body — it will fail signature verification intentionally.

exec: // Webhook requires valid Stripe-Signature header which we cannot fabricate here.
// Expected: 400 Bad Request due to invalid signature.
console.log('ℹ️ To test webhook properly: stripe listen --forward-to localhost:5000/api/payment/webhook');

item.name: Verify Payment - After Stripe Checkout (Manual step)
item.description: Run this AFTER completing the Stripe test payment via the browser URL. Should now return hasPaid: true.

exec: console.log('⚠️ Only run this AFTER completing payment at:', pm.collectionVariables.get('checkoutUrl'));

item.name: Access Paid Idea After Payment (Member)
item.description: After payment is verified, accessing the idea should return 200 with full content.

item.name: 10 - Error & Edge Cases
item.description: Boundary condition tests: unauthorized access, invalid UUIDs, missing tokens.

item.name: Create Paid Idea Without Price (400 Validation)
